user.title: Add RYSE SmartShade
user.description: Put your RYSE device in pairing mode (press the PAIR button) and click Next to continue.

scan.title: Select RYSE SmartShade
scan.description: Press the button on your RYSE SmartShade to put it in pairing mode, then select it below and click Submit. Devices in pairing mode are marked. If you don't see your device, press the button and click Submit again to refresh.

name.title: Name Your SmartShade
name.description: Enter a name for your SmartShade.

settings.title: Configure SmartShade
settings.description: Configure settings for your SmartShade. You can change these later from the integration options.

data_description.disable_battery_sensor: Hide the battery sensor for this device. Useful for plugged-in blinds that report unreliable battery values.

error.not_in_pairing_mode: The selected device is not in pairing mode. Please press the PAIR button on your RYSE SmartShade and try again.
error.no_devices_found: No RYSE SmartShades found. Make sure your device is powered on and in pairing mode (press the PAIR button), then try again.
error.failed_to_pair: Failed to pair with the RYSE device. Make sure it is in pairing mode and not already bonded to another Bluetooth host, then try again.

abort.device_not_found: Couldn't reach the RYSE SmartShade at {address}. Confirm the shade is powered on, in pairing mode (press the PAIR button), and within range of a Bluetooth proxy.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a RYSE SmartShade.
abort.no_device_selected: No device was selected for pairing.

init.title: Re-pair {name}
init.description:
The Bluetooth bond for **{name}** has been lost. To recover:

**Before clicking Submit:**
1. Walk over to your RYSE SmartShade
2. Press the **PAIR button** — the shade's LED should start flashing

**Once the LED is flashing:**
3. Come back here and click **Submit** within the next 30 seconds

Your existing settings (name, options) will be kept. If the LED isn't flashing when you click Submit, the re-pair will fail and you'll need to start over.

abort.device_not_found: No advertisements have been received from **{name}**'s shade. Make sure it's powered on and within range of a Bluetooth proxy. If you've replaced or moved a proxy recently, restart Home Assistant.
abort.cannot_connect: Couldn't establish a Bluetooth connection. The proxy may be out of range, or another integration may be holding the connection. Try moving the proxy closer or restart it.
abort.not_in_pairing_mode: The shade isn't in pairing mode. Press the **PAIR button** on the shade (the LED should start flashing), then return here and try again within 30 seconds.
abort.repair_failed: Re-pairing failed during the pair handshake. The shade may have exited pairing mode before the handshake completed. Press the PAIR button again and retry — be quicker clicking Submit this time.

data_description.disable_battery_sensor: Hide the battery sensor for this device. Useful for plugged-in blinds that report unreliable battery values.
